recommendation: Add only as an experimental Qwen3-4B candidate after one-block/full-generation/cache-generation proof. Do not route MVP demos to it yet.
quality_risk: model card ends with disclaimer: This is a joke. This is not an actual model. Please read the full post first
notes: Architecturally compatible with the existing qwen3 block wrapper family.
Small enough (~8.06GB BF16 storage) to be practical for local/M4 smoke and distributed proof ladders.
No LoRA adapter_config.json; repository contains full BF16 safetensors shards.
Fable-reasoning distillation claim is unproven by the model card; treat behavior as unknown until benchmarked.
